headline: Why GE HealthCare (GEHC) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of healthcare technology company GE HealthCare Technologies (NASDAQ:GEHC) jumped 1.7% in the morning session after RBC Capital Markets initiated coverage on the stock with an Outperform rating and an $80 price target.

headline: GE Healthcare (GEHC) Gets Boost from Upbeat Rating, Double-Digit PT Hike
summary: GE Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:GEHC) is one of the 10 Resilient Stocks Beating Market Slump. GE Healthcare climbed by 5.08 percent on Tuesday to finish at $63.72 apiece, after an investment firm issued a highly optimistic coverage for its stock, with a double-digit price target potential. In a market note, RBC assigned an overweight rating […]
